compiled_state.title: Update brainstorm/SKILL.md Quick Reference with flag-gated External Dependencies behavior
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Add a one-line reference to the planning.external_dependency_block_enabled flag-gated behavior in brainstorm/SKILL.md Quick Reference Phase table.

## File
plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md

## Insertion context
The Quick Reference section starts at line ~920. The Phase table has rows for Phase 1 (Context + Dialogue), Phase 2 (Approach + Spec), Phase 3 (Ticket Integration). Append to the Phase 1 row Key Activities cell: 'When planning.external_dependency_block_enabled=true: Phase 1 runs External Dependencies shape heuristic + classification dialogue; Phase 2 approval gate checks for contradiction resolution. Schema: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md.' Alternatively, append a new table row for 'External Dependencies (flag-gated)'.

## Done Definitions
- When complete, brainstorm/SKILL.md Quick Reference contains a reference to planning.external_dependency_block_enabled and the External Dependencies shape heuristic + classification dialogue behavior
- When complete, the entry includes a pointer to plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md
- When complete, check-skill-refs.sh passes on brainstorm/SKILL.md

## Testing
testing_mode: GREEN
Structural boundary test: grep plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md for 'external_dependency_block_enabled' — must be present.

## Considerations
- [Maintainability] Quick Reference rows are intentionally dense (see existing Phase 2 row); a one-line pointer is sufficient — do not inline the full behavior spec
- [Maintainability] Single source of truth is the contract doc and the full SKILL.md body; Quick Reference is a navigation aid only
